structural_claim: The vacuum is an active medium with observable physical effects that fundamentally shape the dynamics of fields and particles

supporting_results.structural_conclusion: Vacuum fluctuations near event horizons create real particles, showing the vacuum actively participates in gravitational physics
Vacuum fluctuations and spontaneous emission rates depend on boundary conditions, showing the vacuum actively shapes quantum optical processes
Quantum vacuum noise can be redistributed and manipulated, demonstrating the vacuum has active quantum properties
